summary: This document is a technical API or software documentation page showing a mutation class called 'DatasetsMut' with a method 'CreateDatasetFromSnapshotResult'. It displays programming fields (isSuccess: Boolean, message: String) and various implementation error types. This is software development documentation, not biotech or scientific research content.

content_blocks.title: DatasetsMut - CreateDatasetFromSnapshotResult
content_blocks.content: Software API documentation showing a mutation class with two fields: 'isSuccess' (Boolean type) and 'message' (String type). Lists implementation variants including: CreateDatasetResultInvalidSnapshot, CreateDatasetResultMissingInputs, CreateDatasetResultNameCollision, CreateDatasetResultSuccess, MetadataManifestMalformed, and MetadataManifestUnsupportedVersion.

content_blocks.title: Implementations
content_blocks.content: Six error/result types listed: CreateDatasetResultInvalidSnapshot, CreateDatasetResultMissingInputs, CreateDatasetResultNameCollision, CreateDatasetResultSuccess, MetadataManifestMalformed, MetadataManifestUnsupportedVersion
